Appearances:
Tony Davidauskis, property manager, appearing on behalf of plaintiff The Granada, Inc.
R. Michael Lieberman representing the plaintiff.

Defendant Willie Harris is present.
David Cross representing the defendant through limited scope.

This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference. The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer privately for settlement discussions.

This case did not settle, the trial date remains set.
